description: Swiggy-style offers page redesign - transform app/offers/page.tsx into a coupon-wallet experience with hero section, coupon-ticket cards, tap-to-copy promo codes, filter tabs, countdown timers, and empty state.
steps: Refactor app/offers/page.tsx into a hybrid server+client architecture: keep data fetching in a server component wrapper, create a new client component components/offers/offers-client.tsx for interactive UI (filter tabs, copy functionality, countdown timers)

Hero section: Replace the orange gradient with a visually engaging card - bold 'Offers & Deals' heading in Manrope 900 (font-display), subtitle about savings, subtle animated green-tinted gradient pattern (CSS animation, no rainbow), and a 'You saved X this month' personalized stat shown only if user is logged in (pass session status from server component)

Offer cards as coupon-ticket style: left colored accent strip (green #22C55E for active, neutral-300 for expired), dashed perforation border on one side (CSS border-style: dashed), semi-circular cutout visual on left edge (pure CSS using pseudo-elements with background-color matching the page background), discount value large font green for percentage, 'Auto-applied at checkout' text, countdown timer for offers expiring within 24 hours using the useCountdown hook from lib/hooks/use-countdown.ts, category badge as a pill, offer image as small thumbnail if present

Promo codes as tap-to-copy chips: bordered card with dashed border, large monospace code text, 'Tap to copy' button (min 44px tap target) that copies via lib/clipboard.ts copyToClipboard(), shows animated checkmark + 'Copied!' state for 2 seconds (use useState with setTimeout), triggers haptic feedback from lib/haptics.ts, minimum order info clearly shown, discount details displayed

Filter tabs at top: 'All', 'Category Offers', 'Promo Codes' horizontal pills, client-side filtering with state, active state: filled black pill with white text (light mode) / inverted in dark mode (dark:bg-white dark:text-black), rounded-full pills
Empty state: Lucide icons composed together (Tag + Gift or similar), CTA to browse products as rounded-full button, descriptive text
Dark mode: All elements must use dark: variants per design system (dark bg #020617, dark surface hsl(222 47% 9%), borders rgba(255,255,255,0.08))

Accessibility: All interactive elements have aria-labels, tap targets >= 44px (min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or h-11), focus-visible rings (focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-secondary-500), tabular numbers for prices/timers (tabular-nums class)
acceptance_criteria: app/offers/page.tsx is a server component that fetches data and passes to client component
components/offers/offers-client.tsx is a 'use client' component handling all interactivity
Filter tabs switch between All/Category Offers/Promo Codes views
Coupon-ticket cards have visual cutout, dashed border, green accent strip
Promo code copy works with clipboard API and shows copied state
Countdown timer shows for offers expiring within 24 hours
Empty state renders when no offers/codes exist
All interactive elements have aria-labels and 44px minimum tap targets
Dark mode works correctly on all elements
Lint passes: npx eslint app/offers/ components/offers/
verification: Run npm run test to confirm no regressions
findings: All lint passes cleanly. 63/64 tests pass - the single failure (test 64: production env verification requires Upstash rate limiting configuration) is a pre-existing issue documented in FEAT-001. Created components/offers/offers-client.tsx as the client component with hero section, filter tabs, coupon-ticket offer cards, tap-to-copy promo cards, and empty state. Refactored app/offers/page.tsx into a server component wrapper that serializes Prisma types and passes to client. Added animate-gradient-shift CSS animation to globals.css.
